description: A two-section table of dollar figures on a white background. The top section, headed 'Total Federal Educational Expenditures', lists line items such as primary and secondary education, limited English proficiency, migrant schooling and Head Start, with a total of about 6.6 billion dollars. The bottom section, headed 'Total State Educational Expenditures', lists K-12 public school and post-secondary tuition losses, with a grand total of about 73.2 billion dollars.
notable_text: Total Federal Educational Expenditures; Total State Educational Expenditures; Total Educational Expenditures $73,190,760,000
